heading: Today
text: Mostly cloudy, with scattered snow or rain showers through NY, and south of I-89, isolated north, mainly from the Green Mountains east this afternoon.  Remaining cool.  Highs in the 40s, some low 50s southwest.  Winds south near 10 mph east, and 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy from the Green Mountains east, partly cloudy west.  Some localized snow or rain showers mostly north of I-89 late.  Lows in the low to mid 30s.  Winds south near 10 mph, becoming southwest and diminishing to light.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly to mostly sunny west of the Green Mountains.  Variable clouds and sun east, with more clouds northeast, and a few localized, passing rain or wet snow showers.  Highs in the 40s to near 50 north and east of I-89, 50s southwest.  Winds becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
